configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Default developer configuration. Keeps the CUDA backend disabled unless explicitly requested.

configurePresets.name: dev-cuda
configurePresets.description: Developer configuration with the optional CUDA backend enabled. Requires a working CUDA toolkit/driver install.

configurePresets.name: ci
configurePresets.displayName: Unsanitized Debug CI without Sandbox (CUDA off)
configurePresets.description: Unsanitized CI configure without Sandbox for full CPU test and benchmark runs. The pinned Linux/Vulkan identity resolves Auto to GLFW; use explicit Null/headless overrides for no-GLFW work.

configurePresets.name: ci-asan
configurePresets.description: Isolated AddressSanitizer configuration for the canonical CPU test cohort.

configurePresets.name: ci-ubsan
configurePresets.description: Isolated UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer configuration for the canonical CPU test cohort.

configurePresets.name: ci-fast
configurePresets.description: Minimal unsanitized Linux/Null configuration for touched-scope PR feedback. Full CPU, sanitizer, and Vulkan confidence remains in dedicated gates.

configurePresets.name: ci-coverage-cpu
configurePresets.description: Unsanitized Clang source-coverage configuration for the canonical CPU test cohort. Retains the Linux/Vulkan/GLFW contract graph while disabling Sandbox, benchmarks, CUDA, and promoted Vulkan execution.

configurePresets.name: ci-vulkan
configurePresets.displayName: Debug tests + sandbox + promoted Vulkan (CUDA off)
configurePresets.description: CI preset that opts in to the promoted Vulkan backend (INTRINSIC_RUNTIME_ENABLE_PROMOTED_VULKAN=ON) and includes the Sandbox target for end-to-end visible-triangle smoke. Runtime still falls back to Null per the GRAPHICS-033 truth table when the operational gate is not satisfied; gpu;vulkan fixtures opt in via 'ctest -L gpu -L vulkan'.
